---
title: "Global Lake Warming Heterogeneity — Complete Draft"
---

This is the current complete reading order for the descriptive manuscript draft.

> 这是当前描述性论文 draft 的完整通读顺序。

1. [Global Kinematics](01-global-kinematics.qmd) — raw annual warming and trailing 10-year local-speed heterogeneity.
2. [Seasonal and Ice-State Context](02-seasonal-ice-context.qmd) — seasonal, extreme-temperature, and ice-state diagnostics.
3. [Low-Frequency Warming Pattern Decomposition](03-warming-pattern-decomposition.qmd) — spatially balanced PCA trajectory geometry.
4. [Spatially Heterogeneous Teleconnection Sensitivity](04-teleconnection-sensitivity.qmd) — retained NAO/AO association and trajectory bridge.
5. [Discussion and Study Boundaries](05-discussion.qmd) — interpretation, limitations, and next tests.

> 1. 全球运动学；2. 季节与冰期背景；3. 低频 PCA 轨迹分解；4. 遥相关敏感性的空间异质性；5. Discussion 与研究边界。

The former [Warming Pattern Decomposition](02-warming-patterns.qmd) is retained as a detailed historical exploration. It is not part of the current reading order; its validated PCA figures and prose have been condensed into Chapter 3.

> 旧 Warming Pattern Decomposition 保留为详细历史探索，不属于当前通读顺序；其中经过验证的 PCA 图件与文字已压缩进入 Ch3。
